title: First publish 0.1.0
description: Publish `to-execution` 0.1.0 to the public registry from a clean tagged tree, behind the EXEC-015 guards. Publish requires explicit Team Lead approval per packager constraints. Prompt execution matters: unscoped names are first-come, unreserved until first publish. Acceptance: `npx to-execution@latest init` in a scratch dir stamps a manifest identical to a local `node src/bin/cli.js init` run.
notes: HITL — publish requires explicit Team Lead approval. PRD-002 P5. Shipped 2026-06-07 (sprint_1 item S1-10): to-execution@0.1.0 on the registry, shasum verified; acceptance byte-identical; name reserved.
